title: Easy Coelophysis Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Coelophysis Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Simple and fun cartoon Coelophysis dinosaur outline. Toddler-friendly layout. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Coelophysis was a fast, agile predator with hollow bones, measuring about 10 feet in length and weighing only 44 pounds (20 kg).
Fossil evidence suggests Coelophysis lived and hunted in packs, navigating Triassic river basins in search of small prey.
